terms.definition: A for-profit company whose charter commits it to a stated public benefit—in Anthropic's case, responsible AI development—alongside shareholder interests.
Research and engineering aimed at reducing catastrophic or systemic harm from advanced AI, including alignment, monitoring, and robust deployment practices.
How reliably a model follows intended instructions, policies, and corrections—central to Anthropic's product and research goals.
The problem of ensuring AI systems behave in accordance with human values and operator intent, especially as capabilities scale.
